privileged_info_summary: The image_performance_cls_audit task targets https://crawler-test.com/, a real, publicly-available testing website designed for crawling and SEO tool evaluation. Screaming Frog SEO Spider, a legitimate commercial web crawler tool, provides both required features: an Images tab with 'Missing Size Attributes' filter (for identifying Cumulative Layout Shift risks) and an 'Over 100kb' filter (for heavy images). The task requires exporting filtered results to CSV files in /home/ga/Documents/SEO/exports/ and producing a text report in /home/ga/Documents/SEO/reports/. These directory paths are confirmed in the environment scripts. CLS (Cumulative Layout Shift) is an official Google Core Web Vital metric, and images without width/height attributes are a documented cause of CLS issues.
